subject: [PATCH nfs-utils 08/17] exportd/mountd: add netlink support for the nfsd.fh cache

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the patch's impact on performance and scalability, suggesting further analysis is needed to ensure it meets the project's requirements.

2026-03-16.patch_summary: This patch series refactors the exportd/mountd code to add netlink support for the nfsd.fh cache, allowing for more efficient and scalable handling of expkey requests.
